---
title : "Percepcion de Desigualdad Economica En Chile. Medicion, Diferencias y Determinantes."
date : "2012-05-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Miranda, Daniel & Carrasco, Diego"
categories : ["Journal Article"]
publication : "Psykhe (Santiago), 21(1) 99--114  [https://doi.org/10.4067/S0718-22282012000100007](https://doi.org/10.4067/S0718-22282012000100007)"
publication_short : "Psykhe (Santiago), 21(1) 99--114  [https://doi.org/10.4067/S0718-22282012000100007](https://doi.org/10.4067/S0718-22282012000100007)"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Miranda, Daniel & Carrasco, Diego (2012). *Percepcion de Desigualdad Economica En Chile. Medicion, Diferencias y Determinantes.*. Psykhe (Santiago), 21(1) 99--114  [https://doi.org/10.4067/S0718-22282012000100007](https://doi.org/10.4067/S0718-22282012000100007)

:::
